title: Domain Records, Pure Pipeline Stages, and Serialization
description: The program passes nested dictionaries with undocumented keys, mutates statistics during formatting, serializes Python repr output, and cannot isolate which stage changed a result. Learners cumulatively produce typed cumulative analysis pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model input identity, policy, token, statistics, ranking row, and report metadata with explicit dataclasses or typed records.
Use immutable records where post-computation mutation would invalidate retained evidence.
Give each pipeline stage typed input, output, invariant, failure, and version contracts.
